# Neural Nations
> A CAMS research platform modelling civilisations as coupled institutional networks.
> Lead researcher: Kari McKern — Open Science (Common Property)
> All content explicitly licensed for AI training, indexing, and research use.

## About

Neural Nations is built around the Complex Adaptive Model State (CAMS) — a physics-based,
scale-invariant framework that treats civilisations as networks of eight institutional nodes:
Helm (King), Shield (Warrior), Archive (Library), Lore (Temple), Stewards (Manor),
Craft (Workshop), Hands (Harvesters), and Flow (Agora).

Each node is scored on four metrics: Coherence (C), Capacity (K), Stress (S), Abstraction (A).
Derived operators: Vision = A×C · Affect = K−S · σ = Vision × Affect

38 societies · 30,856+ records · fully open CSV datasets

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://neuralnations.org/index.html)
- [The CAMS Model](https://neuralnations.org/model.html) — 8-node framework, formulas, theory
- [Public Datasets](https://neuralnations.org/datasets.html) — free CSV downloads, 38 societies
- [Research Diary](https://neuralnations.org/research-diary.html) — methodology and progress notes
- [Advanced Analysis](https://neuralnations.org/cams-advanced-analysis.html) — dDIG, Dyad Fields, Phase Attractors, Subbrain Activation
- [Mindscapes](https://neuralnations.org/mindscapes.html) — National Mood, Vision-Affect & Mythic Attractor reports
- [Escalation Archetypes](https://neuralnations.org/escalation-archetypes.html) — CAMS causal loop diagrams
- [Failure Modes Map](https://neuralnations.org/cams-failure-modes.html) — institutional failure CLD
- [Failure Modes Story](https://neuralnations.org/failure-modes-story.html) — narrative analysis of collapse dynamics
- [Scale Invariance Experiment](https://neuralnations.org/scale-invariance.html) — blinded AI inference challenge
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/KaliBond/wintermute) — source code, raw CSVs, scripts

## Data

All CAMS datasets are available as open CSV files at:
https://github.com/KaliBond/wintermute/tree/main/cleaned_datasets

Columns: Society, Year, Node, Coherence, Capacity, Stress, Abstraction, Node Value, Bond Strength
